description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a predominantly white exterior and clean, geometric lines. The front features a set of three garage doors at ground level, a main entry door with side windows, and a small landscaped area with grass, plants, and a basketball hoop. The upper story has a flat roof with a partially open terrace and a smaller, raised section with a gravel surface. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on all sides, and the rear includes a stairway leading to a side entrance and a patio area. The house is constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and metal or wooden doors. Minimalist landscaping and a rooftop terrace add to its contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, symmetrical windows, a three-car garage, and a landscaped front yard. Features include a rooftop terrace, patio, and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing three garage doors, main entry door with side windows, landscaped yard, basketball hoop, and patio area.
description_view_1: Rear view with a raised gravel roof section, minimal landscaping, and two side doors at ground level.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting symmetrical window rows, flat roof, and the open rooftop terrace.
description_view_3: Side view with a stairway leading to a side entrance, visible patio, and large ground-level windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door flanked by side windows, accessed via a small porch with steps and minimal landscaping.
